task.title: Write feedback compiler skill contract
task.summary: Define feedback-mode agent instructions so semantic user intent is captured through `codewiki_diff_table` before `feedback_build` creation.

goal.outcome: Feedback mode makes semantic diff rows, explicit user acceptance, and `feedback_build` creation mandatory and unambiguous.
acceptance: `codewiki-feedback` skill frontmatter has a specific trigger for ambiguous intent, semantic proposals, requirement changes, and user approval decisions.
Instructions require `codewiki_diff_table` for proposed semantic changes and require accepted rows before `codewiki_build kind=feedback`.
Instructions define when feedback validation happens, what evidence is required, and when the agent must stop instead of writing lower-layer docs/code.
non_goals: Do not edit documentation, planning, implementation, or validation loop content except a route pointer needed by feedback mode.
Do not create roadmap tasks from unaccepted feedback rows.
verification: Run package skill asset smoke coverage after adding/updating tests.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Implemented TASK-093 feedback compiler skill contract with a dedicated codewiki-feedback skill, exact diff-table/build guidance, and tests covering the new public skill surface.
checks_run: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs
npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack

evidence: Added prompt asset smoke assertions for feedback skill existence, frontmatter, mandatory `codewiki_diff_table`, feedback build compilation point, and absence of `ask_user`.
Updated package smoke to expect `codewiki-feedback` as a public package skill.
Updated TASK-076 restructure test to allow the main CodeWiki skill plus focused feedback compiler skill.
notes: Targeted asset/package tests were run before broader smoke and feature tests.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Created focused public feedback compiler skill under `skills/codewiki-feedback/`.
Updated legacy feedback loop asset to route through `codewiki_diff_table` and `feedback_build`.
Updated main CodeWiki skill and README to acknowledge the new feedback skill surface.
notes: No TypeScript source behavior changed; edits are skill/documentation/test contract changes.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Added prompt asset smoke assertions for feedback skill existence, frontmatter, mandatory `codewiki_diff_table`, feedback build compilation point, and absence of `ask_user`.
Updated package smoke to expect `codewiki-feedback` as a public package skill.
Updated TASK-076 restructure test to allow the main CodeWiki skill plus focused feedback compiler skill.
code_change_evidence: Created focused public feedback compiler skill under `skills/codewiki-feedback/`.
Updated legacy feedback loop asset to route through `codewiki_diff_table` and `feedback_build`.
Updated main CodeWiki skill and README to acknowledge the new feedback skill surface.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: `codewiki-feedback` skill frontmatter has a specific trigger for ambiguous intent, semantic proposals, requirement changes, and user approval decisions.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Created `skills/codewiki-feedback/SKILL.md` with `name: codewiki-feedback` and a description targeting ambiguous intent, semantic change proposals, requirements, direction, and approval before canonical changes.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Instructions require `codewiki_diff_table` for proposed semantic changes and require accepted rows before `codewiki_build kind=feedback`.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: `skills/codewiki-feedback/SKILL.md` and `skills/codewiki-feedback/references/tools.md` define `codewiki_diff_table action="propose"`, row-level accept/reject/defer/revise actions, and `codewiki_build kind="feedback"` only from accepted rows.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Instructions define when feedback validation happens, what evidence is required, and when the agent must stop instead of writing lower-layer docs/code.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Feedback skill workflow includes validation/routing rules, stop conditions, output contract, and forbidden feedback-mode writes; `skills/codewiki/loops/feedback.md` mirrors the durable diff-table/build sequence and removes nonexistent user-decision tool guidance.

closure_brief.user_intent: Improve CodeWiki skills so feedback mode uses the semantic diff-table tool and produces accepted feedback builds instead of chat-only intent.
implemented_changes: Added dedicated `codewiki-feedback` public skill with exact feedback compiler workflow.
Added feedback tool reference requiring `codewiki_diff_table` before `feedback_build`.
Updated legacy feedback loop guidance, main skill routing, README, and tests for the new skill surface.
acceptance_evidence: Feedback skill frontmatter and workflow exist.
Feedback skill requires `codewiki_diff_table` and accepted rows before `codewiki_build kind="feedback"`.
Tests and package smoke pass with the new public skill.
checks: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs
npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack
non_goals_preserved: Did not create roadmap tasks from unaccepted feedback rows.
remaining_risks: Generated CodeWiki graph/task view files changed because roadmap/build state was updated.
Implementation build lacks source_planning_build due accepted feedback-to-task shortcut used before the new planning skill exists.

risks: Implementation build does not cite a planning_build because TASK-093 was created directly from accepted feedback during this planning refactor; future loop tasks should restore normal documentation/planning build traceability.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-093 Write feedback compiler skill contract implementation evidence
commit.body:
Implemented TASK-093 feedback compiler skill contract with a dedicated codewiki-feedback skill, exact diff-table/build guidance, and tests covering the new public skill surface.

Checks: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs, npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack, npm run test:features, npm run typecheck, skill markdown link check script
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
